Hero.subtitle: Launched in 2–4 weeks. Bilingual by default, not translated. Every inquiry logged to your CRM instead of your inbox.

BilingualServices.title: Bilingual web development
BilingualServices.subtitle: Spanish isn't an afterthought or a translation plugin. Content, UX, and SEO are built for both audiences from day one.

benefit1.title: First-class Spanish
benefit1.description: Native voice, not machine translation. Headings, meta, alt text, and microcopy are authored in Spanish — not copy-pasted through DeepL.

benefit2.title: Real bilingual UX
benefit2.description: Language switching that preserves URL, scroll position, and context. Works for customers who code-switch mid-session.

benefit3.title: SEO in both languages
benefit3.description: hreflang, localized keyword research, and sitemaps that help you rank in Spanish search — not just appear in it.

bilingualSupport.title: Bilingual both ways
bilingualSupport.description: Switches language mid-conversation the way your customers do. Spanish answers are written, not translated.

aiPowered.title: Trained on your SOPs
aiPowered.description: Answers from your pricing, hours, services, and policies — not the open web. Knowledge base updates without retraining.

leadCapture.title: Qualifies and routes
leadCapture.description: Captures problem, timeline, and budget. Hands qualified leads to your inbox or CRM with full context.

seamlessIntegration.title: Fits your stack
seamlessIntegration.description: Connects to your CRM, calendar, and email tools. Every conversation logged, not dropped.

Benefits.p1: Small-business inquiries get lost the same way every time: the message lands at 9pm, the reply goes out at 9am, the customer already found someone else.
Benefits.p2: A trained chatbot answers in the first minute, qualifies the lead, and routes it where you can act on it — without you touching the keyboard.

instantResponses.title: Sub-minute replies
instantResponses.description: FAQ-level questions — pricing, hours, availability, services — answered instantly. Harder questions get flagged and handed to you with context.

availability.title: Works after hours
availability.description: Answers inquiries every hour the business is closed, not just the ones during working hours. Weekends and holidays included.

smartData.title: Captures what you need
smartData.description: Pulls out problem, timeline, and budget — and logs them against the conversation, not just an email address.

lucia.quote: The bilingual chatbot handles 70% of our inbound questions. We only touch the conversations that actually need a human.

daniel.quote: The AI agents answer the first-line questions that used to land in my inbox at 7am. I get to the real decisions first.

rebecca.quote: We launched in three weeks. Clients keep asking how we did it.

salvador.quote: The chatbot answers after-hours client questions and qualifies callers before we pick up the phone.

ricardo.quote: Their bilingual strategy opened a customer base we were effectively invisible to. First Spanish-speaking contracts closed within a month of launch.

sam.quote: Started with SEO. Stayed for the chatbot and social. They're the ops team I don't have to hire.

Rationale.starterFast: You need a focused site live in the next few weeks. Starter fits the scope; Business is there if you add more later.
Rationale.starterChatbotFast: A chatbot for your current site, shipped in weeks. Starter keeps the scope tight.
Rationale.businessBilingualFast: Bilingual done right — authored in both languages — pushes you past Starter. Business covers it without Professional's overhead.
Rationale.businessBoth: A website and a chatbot in one scope. Business handles both without stepping up to Professional.
Rationale.businessMedium: You've got a month or two, which means room to do both well. Business is the right center point.
Rationale.professionalComplex: Both a site and a chatbot, bilingual, on a longer timeline. Professional gives you the room and a dedicated PM.
Rationale.professionalFlexible: No rush, and you want it done right in both languages. Professional covers the depth without cutting corners.
